name: Winged Kuriboh LV10
name_jp: ハネクリボー <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＬＶ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>レベル</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>１０
desc: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned with "Transcendent Wings". During your opponent's Battle Phase (Quick Effect): You can Tribute this face-up card; destroy as many Attack Position monsters your opponent controls as possible, and if you do, inflict damage to your opponent equal to the combined original ATK of those destroyed monster(s).
mnst_eff: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned with "Transcendent Wings". During your opponent's Battle Phase (Quick Effect): You can Tribute this face-up card; destroy as many Attack Position monsters your opponent controls as possible, and if you do, inflict damage to your opponent equal to the combined original ATK of those destroyed monster(s).
eff: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned with "Transcendent Wings". During your opponent's Battle Phase (Quick Effect): You can Tribute this face-up card; destroy as many Attack Position monsters your opponent controls as possible, and if you do, inflict damage to your opponent equal to the combined original ATK of those destroyed monster(s).

sets.set: Legendary Collection 2: The Duel Academy Years Mega Pack

mst: Destroys your opponent's Attack Position Monster Cards
summoning: Must be Special Summoned by a specific card effect
